steps.title: Graph the quadratic
steps.content: Enter $f(x)=x^2-48x+2304$ in Desmos. The lowest point is the vertex $(24,1728)$, so the minimum value is its $y$-coordinate, $1728$.

steps.title: Read the requested value
steps.content:
The question asks for the minimum output, not the $x$-coordinate where it occurs.
The answer is 1728.
